prompt: Write the opening paragraph of a children's book about a shy octopus who wants to make friends.
response: In the twinkling blue waters of Coral Cove, there lived a little octopus named Olive. Olive was clever and kind, with eight wiggly arms perfect for hugs. But Olive was also very shy. Every day, she watched the other sea creatures play hide-and-seek among the swaying seaweed, wishing she could join them. If only she could find the courage to say hello, maybe she could make a friend or two!
